name: You vs The Entire Fleet (Skibidi toilet EP 79)
description:
"The Cosmos hear no cries, Only power can speak" - Astro Duchess

"Sybau I hear the sorrow, the pain. Let them consume yo ahh. mango nonadrenaline stillwater those who knows" - Weeping God

Yes. Skibidi Toilet bot in this economy.

Who cares. I'm sick of Astro Duchess. That Bih destroy everything, so I made this bot to slime her ahh

Alliance is Cooked. Unless Titan Speaker gay 3.0 arrived in time

I'll update if the next EP dropped. For now I'll only fix the small details

Update: Everyone is cooked. You can't escape your doom. (Camerawoman died💔 I'll kill those bastard and make sure they burn in the Tartarus, how dare you took my gyat away..)

Remove Speakerman (they have nothing to do here. Because their armada is somewhere else and some of them in the base barely do shit)
